text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Silence Suzuka's training is<n>proceeding well, though today<n>something else seems to be on her<n>mind.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Phew. A 0.1-second improvement. Ifonly everything could go as smoothlyas my running... Sigh...
choice_data_list:
Was there an issue with some of the other
training?

Was there an issue with some of the other
training?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh, no. It's not training that's the<n>issue.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: There's actually a fan event this<n>weekend that I'm a bit worried<n>about...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I've only ever focused on running, so<n>I'm not really used to anything else.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I couldn't think of a response the last<n>time a fan tried to speak with me. It<n>was like the room was spinning, but it<n>turns out...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I was the one spinning. There was<n>even a magazine article about how I<n>just started veering left, walking in a<n>little circle whenever somebody<n>talked to me.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I can't help but feel anxious about<n>fan events now... What if I do<n>something silly again?
choice_data_list: Sounds like you get quite worked up.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes, I suppose I do kind of let that<n>happen.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I don't want to resign myself to doing<n>these things half-heartedly... But at<n>the same time, I don't feel like I can<n>do it well.
choice_data_list: Want to try practicing for it with me?
Want to try practicing for it with me?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh? You mean practice... with you?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: And so, in order to help prepare her<n>for social events, I take on the role of<n>an enthusiastic Suzuka fan.
choice_data_list: Your latest race was amazing! Your best ever!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh... This might be harder than I<n>thought.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Umm... To say my race was amazing...<n>That's quite a compliment.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: And "best ever"? You must have<n>been watching my races for quite<n>some time... Right...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you very much.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Um, that's all.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Don't try to make me feel better. It's<n>just like I thought... it's far too late to<n>try to improve my social skills...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I don't think I could ever be as<n>talkative as Fukukitaru is about<n>fortune telling, or adapt to any kind of<n>conversation like Taiki can.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hopefully I can manage to force a<n>smile and say something at least<n>somewhat interesting.
choice_data_list: I'll prepare a little treat for you after it's all done.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: A treat?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: The weekend comes fast, and we<n>find ourselves at the fan event.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Wow... I feel almost as tense as<n>before a race, but in a completely<n>different way.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'm definitely still a little worried about<n>messing up... But yeah, I'll do my<n>best.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Thank you. Into the crowd I go. I'll be<n>looking forward to that treat, then.

text_block_list.name: Suzuka Fã
text_block_list.text: Suzuka, I'm always rooting for you!<n>You've been getting better with every<n>race lately!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um, thank you! I'll make sure from<n>now on to um... Uh...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh! I'm privileged to have you<n>appreciate all the little ways I've<n>improved.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: And um... Umm...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I watch her give it her all amongst the<n>throngs of fans for a while before<n>setting out to procure the treat she<n>chose.

text_block_list.name: Sweets Shop Staff
text_block_list.text: The end of the queue for the Royal<n>Honey Carrot Tart is here! The wait<n>time is 140 minutes!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I line up at a popular cake shop in the<n>nearby shopping mall. It probably<n>won't actually take 140 minutes...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Four hours... Did you really have to<n>wait here that long?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh, I guess the tarts have to cool<n>down after they're done baking too...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um, I'm really sorry. I couldn't think<n>of a treat I wanted myself, so I just<n>asked for the one everyone at the<n>academy was talking about...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: But you know, it really did motivate<n>me to do my best at the fan event.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I mean... It's not like I was able to<n>respond to everyone thoughtfully. But<n>you know...
choice_data_list: You managed to keep a positive attitude?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes, I did! Much more so than usual,<n>at least.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Before now I would always be<n>overcome with worry about saying or<n>doing something embarrassing...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Knowing that there was a treat<n>waiting for me at the end allowed me<n>to simply do my best and work<n>toward it.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: It became like a sort of finish line for<n>me. So I approached it as such.
choice_data_list:
And sweets taste even better after working hard
for them.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I can't wait to try it!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Silence Suzuka wears a satisfied<n>expression on her face after tackling<n>the day's unfamiliar challenge.
